title: Gap Map
description: Each field placed by where its institutional weakness lies. Distance from the diagonal is the gap between capacity and control.
note: Circle size is institutional importance. Illustrative values.

topics.label: AI Governance
topics.gap: Frontier knowledge sits in private labs and universities while formal authority sits, thinly, in public agencies.

topics.label: Cybersecurity
topics.gap: Authority and expertise both exist, but responsibility is split across many agencies and firms.

topics.label: Military AI
topics.gap: Defence holds the authority but depends on private labs for the underlying capability.

topics.label: Data Governance
topics.gap: Broad public stakes with no clear owner and limited oversight of large private data systems.

topics.label: Biosecurity
topics.gap: Expertise concentrated in universities and labs, with little standing authority to govern it.
